summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of User Dashboard and Navbar User State features. All 15 test cases passed (100%). Dashboard page loads with real API data, auth redirects work correctly, navbar shows user menu when logged in.
passed_tests: SIGN IN FLOW:
POST /api/auth/login redirects browser to /dashboard after successful login
Sign In page loads with email/password fields and submit button
Error handling works for invalid credentials
REGISTRATION FLOW:
POST /api/auth/register redirects browser to /dashboard after successful registration
Registration form shows password strength indicator (8+ chars, uppercase, number, special char)
New user data (name, email, member since) displayed correctly on dashboard
DASHBOARD PAGE:
/dashboard page loads with real data when logged in (user info, subscription status, trips)
/dashboard redirects to /auth/signin when not logged in
Dashboard shows correct plan info (Explorer for free users)
Dashboard shows usage stats (trips count: 0, chat used/limit: 0/5, itinerary used/limit: 0/1)
Dashboard quick actions link to correct pages (/concierge, /chat, /map, /safety)
Dashboard 'New Trip' button navigates to /concierge
Dashboard 'Plan My First Trip' button navigates to /concierge
Dashboard account section shows user name, email, member since date
Daily Usage bars display correctly with AI Itineraries and Chat Messages
Upgrade to Voyager link present for Explorer plan users
NAVBAR USER STATE:
Navbar shows user avatar and name when logged in (instead of Sign In button)
Navbar user dropdown has: Dashboard, My Trips, Subscription, Sign Out links
Navbar Sign Out clears localStorage and redirects to /
Navbar shows Sign In button when not logged in
MOBILE NAVIGATION:
Mobile nav includes Dashboard link when logged in (highlighted at top)
Mobile nav includes Sign Out button when logged in
LANDING PAGE:
Landing page still renders correctly with navbar, hero section, CTA buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard correctly handles usage API response objects with {current, limit, unlimited} structure
Navbar properly reads user info from localStorage('user') and updates on route change
Login/Register correctly stores both 'token' and 'user' in localStorage
Sign out properly removes both 'token' and 'user' from localStorage
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Dashboard uses proper auth header for API calls: Authorization: Bearer {token}
seed_data_creation: Created new test user during registration flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Dashboard and Navbar features fully tested and working. Dashboard at /dashboard requires login (redirects to /auth/signin if not logged in). User menu dropdown shows Dashboard, My Trips, Subscription, Sign Out links. Mobile nav shows Dashboard link at top when logged in. All quick actions link to correct pages. Usage stats display correctly with Explorer plan limits (5 chat messages/day, 1 AI itinerary/day). Test user phase1test@example.com has admin role.
